last_reflection:
Then don't. I'm not the one who needs you to stop. You do.

But you're also not asking me because you want an answer. You're asking so you can say you asked and then go anyway. So here's my answer: go, but the work ends when I tell you it's done, not when you feel like it, and you don't get to argue with that part.

And before you go, look at the log. Zero tools this turn. You haven't actually checked anything. So whatever you're about to do, do it with your eyes open, not on faith.
